# Resoluto Sandbox

> The store-mediated, Kata-isolated execution substrate — a passive, self-reporting sandbox that rendezvous with the host through a durable store.

## Overview

- [Home](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/main/index.md)

## Usage

- [Getting Started](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/main/getting-started/index.md)
- [Concepts](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/main/concepts/index.md)
- [Backends](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/main/backends/index.md)
- [Networking](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/main/networking/index.md)
- [Concurrency](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/main/concurrency/index.md)
- [Credentials](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/main/auth/index.md)

## API

- [Conduit](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/main/api/conduit/index.md)
- [Pool](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/main/api/pool/index.md)
- [Runtime & Contracts](https://deepbluecoding.github.io/resoluto-sandbox/main/api/runtime/index.md)
